action.reasoning: Observation: Training crashed immediately on scheduler init due to TypeError on 'verbose' arg (deprecated in newer torch); GRU model, dataset, normalization, predict contract test, and metrics logging were otherwise set up correctly. Prior best eval MSE=0.5189 from DLinear (val_loss ~1.21 plateau). Analysis: GRU enables cross-feature mixing vs per-channel linear; removing deprecated arg + keeping 20 epochs + ReduceLROnPlateau + AdamW will allow proper run. ~15min/iter from history fits remaining ~0.66h budget; expect improved MSE from better architecture. Decision: Patch only the scheduler line in train.py (no other changes), execute full training, then submit_eval on best.pt for next baseline.
